summary: Phase 3 Slice 1 (NextActionsPanel + useClinicalReturnState + telemetry) E2E validation. All backend contract tests pass (13/13). Frontend panel renders correctly with proper data-testids, Open click scrolls + fires telemetry, feature-flag guardrails (both child and nested parent) hide the panel, route-instance token is opaque with `r_` prefix and never contains the patient UUID. Staff (read-only) correctly sees empty state (write-gated actions suppressed). Only gap: none of the 8 demo patients trigger a *dismissible* rule (schedule-remaining-planned-visits / record-configured-outcome-measure), so the Dismiss click, reload-persistence, sessionStorage PHI-scan on populated state, and logout-clears-dismissal paths could not be exercised end-to-end in the browser. Frontend unit tests (jest, 25 passing per E1) cover these paths; a seed patient with an active care plan whose (planned - completed - scheduled) > 0 OR configured outcome measures + no recent measurement would enable full E2E in future iterations.
action_items: OPTIONAL (not blocking): Extend demo seed data (DEMO_SEED.md) with at least one patient whose active treatment plan has `total_visits_planned > visits_completed + visits_scheduled` so that the `schedule-remaining-planned-visits` (dismissible) row can be exercised end-to-end in future browser regressions. Ditto for `record-configured-outcome-measure` — attach a `configured_outcome_measures` array on an active plan with no `summary.outcomes.last_recorded_at` within 14 days.
critical_code_review_comments: nextActionsEngine.js:74 — `total === 1 ? 's' : ''` (should be inverted) — actually correct: '1 unsigned document' vs '2 unsigned documents'. False alarm.

useClinicalReturnState.js: session storage is written even when the section slug is unknown; assertKnownSection only warns. Acceptable given tight allow-list in the engine, but a hard throw in dev would be safer.
NextActionsPanel: no aria-live region for row addition/removal after dismiss — dismiss is silent for screen-reader users. Non-blocking a11y nit.

Backend telemetry router: ActionSectionSlug enum has only 2 members ('current-care-status', 'next-actions') while UI-event's SectionSlug enum has 9 — the two enums are intentionally distinct; consider adding a comment explaining that ActionSectionSlug is a *host surface* list, not a jump-target list, to avoid a future maintainer accidentally widening it.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (dismiss flow blocked by seed data — 6/6 other flows pass)

test_credentials: doctor@ccms.app / Doctor@ComplianceClinic1 (used for full E2E). staff@ccms.app / Staff@ComplianceClinic1 (read-only permission-filter check).
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing demo patients; noted gap for dismissible-rule coverage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 demo patients returned by GET /api/patients?q=%25 lack an active plan configured such that `schedule-remaining-planned-visits` or `record-configured-outcome-measure` fires. When those rules do fire, verify: (1) row disappears after Dismiss, (2) sessionStorage `ccms.clinical.returnState.v1` gets a `<token>::next-actions` key with `dismissed: [<id>]`, (3) reload preserves the dismissal, (4) full logout+re-login clears it. Backend URL: https://imaging-data-quality.preview.emergentagent.com. Break-glass modal appears for doctor when opening a chart — textarea placeholder 'Covering for Dr. Monroe...' + 'Record & continue' button.

validations_executed.panel_present_on_clinical_tab: PASS (D. Stone patient renders panel with 1 action row)
validations_executed.row_testids_correct: PASS (label + why + open present; dismiss only on dismissible rules per allow-list)
validations_executed.open_click_fires_telemetry: PASS (payload: event_name=clinical_next_action_interaction, action_id=complete-missing-documentation, interaction=opened, section_slug=next-actions, source_surface=patient-clinical, layout_version=v2)
validations_executed.route_instance_token: PASS (history.state.ccms_route_token = 'r_te16feqzmrfk0yj4', does NOT contain patient UUID)
validations_executed.feature_flag_parent_off: PASS (parent clinicalRedesign=off cascades to child even when phase3 default-on)
validations_executed.staff_readonly_filtering: PASS (Mia Ramirez / staff sees next-actions-empty — all write-gated rules suppressed)
validations_executed.dismiss_flow_e2e: SKIPPED — no demo patient triggers a dismissible rule. Covered by jest unit tests per E1 note.
